hero.title: Find your inner
hero.subtitle: A conscious companionship for your inner transformation through meditation courses, silent retreats, and personal growth processes.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Companionship for your inner journey
services.courseDesc: Structured programs to learn meditation and deepen your practice.
services.retreatDesc: Immersive experiences in nature to disconnect and reconnect.
services.coachingDesc: Individual sessions to work on your inner growth processes.

onlineCourse.title: Online Meditation Course
onlineCourse.subtitle: Learn to meditate from home, at your own pace
onlineCourse.module1Desc: Introduction to meditation and its benefits.
onlineCourse.module2Desc: Techniques and exercises to develop your practice.
onlineCourse.module3Desc: Bringing meditation into your daily life.

community.title: Our Community
community.subtitle: Join a group of people on the same path
community.desc1: Monthly online meetings to practice together.
community.desc2: Private group for support and sharing experiences.

retreats.title: In-Person Retreats
retreats.subtitle: Transformative experiences in natural settings
retreats.retreat1Desc: Complete immersion in the practice of silence and meditation.
retreats.retreat2Desc: An escape from routine to reconnect with yourself.
retreats.retreat3Desc: For experienced practitioners seeking to deepen.

reprogramming.title: Mental Reprogramming
reprogramming.subtitle: Transform your limiting patterns
reprogramming.desc: A guided process to identify and transform beliefs and patterns that no longer serve you, creating new neural pathways toward well-being.
